creator: jason@aventia.pw
text:
(In reply to Charlie Li from comment #3)
I appreciate that you are providing me support for the issue I am experiencing, and I thank you for that.  Not to worry in most cases I find a way around the stop, but indeed my purpose here for reporting the reproduced bug is solely for documenting the stop in bugzilla.  Sometimes I do miss something, I try to be understanding but at the same time I am helping the community when I report stops when building 3rd party software using supported tools.

Of course, before running portmaster -ay I run portsnap fetch update so the partial upgrade comment in some other bug is not a true statement.

I have been updating FreeBSD systems since using fbsd4.2 and some may feel I am not currently following the latest trends in building software. Portmaster is supported and my first example was actually simply running make.

Have a great week!
Jason
